steps.title: Find the y‑intercept on the graph
steps.content:
The y‑intercept occurs where the graph meets the y‑axis, i.e., where $$x=0$$.
Reading the attached graph, the point is $$(0,4)$$, so the y‑coordinate is $$4$$.

steps.title: Select the matching answer choice
steps.content:
The y‑intercept value is $$4$$.
The answer is 4.
